summary: T-Mobile subscriber FGotD out of market - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a T-Mobile subscriber
AND there is a scheduled/in-progress FGotD
AND the user is not in the viewing market of the game

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a scheduled/in-progress FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see feed buttons for both teams
AND the user can playback feeds for both teams
